#====================================================================================================
# START - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================

# THIS SECTION CONTAINS CRITICAL TESTING INSTRUCTIONS FOR BOTH AGENTS
# BOTH MAIN_AGENT AND TESTING_AGENT MUST PRESERVE THIS ENTIRE BLOCK

# Communication Protocol:
# If the `testing_agent` is available, main agent should delegate all testing tasks to it.
#
# You have access to a file called `test_result.md`. This file contains the complete testing state
# and history, and is the primary means of communication between main and the testing agent.
#
# Main and testing agents must follow this exact format to maintain testing data. 
# The testing data must be entered in yaml format Below is the data structure:
# 
## user_problem_statement: {problem_statement}
## backend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.py"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## frontend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.js"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## metadata:
##   created_by: "main_agent"
##   version: "1.0"
##   test_sequence: 0
##   run_ui: false
##
## test_plan:
##   current_focus:
##     - "Task name 1"
##     - "Task name 2"
##   stuck_tasks:
##     - "Task name with persistent issues"
##   test_all: false
##   test_priority: "high_first"  # or "sequential" or "stuck_first"
##
## agent_communication:
##     -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##     -message: "Communication message between agents"

# Protocol Guidelines for Main agent
#
# 1. Update Test Result File Before Testing:
#    - Main agent must always update the `test_result.md` file before calling the testing agent
#    - Add implementation details to the status_history
#    - Set `needs_retesting` to true for tasks that need testing
#    - Update the `test_plan` section to guide testing priorities
#    - Add a message to `agent_communication` explaining what you've done
#
# 2. Incorporate User Feedback:
#    - When a user provides feedback that something is or isn't working, add this information to the relevant task's status_history
#    - Update the working status based on user feedback
#    - If a user reports an issue with a task that was marked as working, increment the stuck_count
#    - Whenever user reports issue in the app, if we have testing agent and task_result.md file so find the appropriate task for that and append in status_history of that task to contain the user concern and problem as well 
#
# 3. Track Stuck Tasks:
#    - Monitor which tasks have high stuck_count values or where you are fixing same issue again and again, analyze that when you read task_result.md
#    - For persistent issues, use websearch tool to find solutions
#    - Pay special attention to tasks in the stuck_tasks list
#    - When you fix an issue with a stuck task, don't reset the stuck_count until the testing agent confirms it's working
#
# 4. Provide Context to Testing Agent:
#    - When calling the testing agent, provide clear instructions about:
#      - Which tasks need testing (reference the test_plan)
#      - Any authentication details or configuration needed
#      - Specific test scenarios to focus on
#      - Any known issues or edge cases to verify
#
# 5. Call the testing agent with specific instructions referring to test_result.md
#
# IMPORTANT: Main agent must ALWAYS update test_result.md BEFORE calling the testing agent, as it relies on this file to understand what to test next.

#====================================================================================================
# END - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================



#====================================================================================================
# Testing Data - Main Agent and testing sub agent both should log testing data below this section
#====================================================================================================

user_problem_statement: "E-commerce backend API comprehensive testing"

backend:
  - task: "API Root Endpoint"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "API root endpoint working correctly, returns welcome message"

  - task: "Authentication - User Signup"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "User signup working correctly, creates user and returns token"

  - task: "Authentication - User Login"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "User login working correctly, validates credentials and returns token"

  - task: "Authentication - Admin Login"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Admin login working correctly with default credentials (admin/admin123)"

  - task: "Authentication - Get Current User"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/auth/me working correctly, returns user info with valid token"

  - task: "Products - List All"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/products working correctly, returns products with pagination (6 seeded products)"

  - task: "Products - Search"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Product search working correctly, search for 'wireless' returned 1 product"

  - task: "Products - Filter by Category"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Category filtering working correctly, Electronics category returned 3 products"

  - task: "Categories - List All"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/categories working correctly, returned 3 categories: Electronics, Fashion, Sports"

  - task: "Products - Get Details"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/products/{id} working correctly, returns detailed product information"

  - task: "Cart - Get Cart"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/cart working correctly, returns user's cart (initially empty)"

  - task: "Cart - Add Item"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "POST /api/cart working correctly, successfully adds items to cart"

  - task: "Cart - Update Item"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "PUT /api/cart working correctly, successfully updates item quantities"

  - task: "Cart - Remove Item"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "DELETE /api/cart/{productId} working correctly, successfully removes items from cart"

  - task: "Payment - Create Order"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "POST /api/payment/create-order working correctly, creates Razorpay order with mock ID"

  - task: "Payment - Verify Payment"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "POST /api/payment/verify working correctly, properly validates payment signature (fails with mock data as expected)"

  - task: "Orders - List User Orders"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/orders working correctly, returns user's orders (empty as no successful payment)"

  - task: "Orders - Get Order Details"
    implemented: true
    working: "NA"
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/orders/{id} endpoint implemented but not testable without valid order ID (payment verification failed with mock data)"

  - task: "User Profile - Get Profile"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/user/profile working correctly, returns user profile information"

  - task: "User Profile - Update Profile"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "PUT /api/user/profile working correctly, successfully updates user profile data"

  - task: "Admin - Dashboard Stats"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/admin/stats working correctly, returns dashboard statistics (6 products, 1 user)"

  - task: "Admin - List All Products"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/admin/products working correctly, returns all products for admin view"

  - task: "Admin - Create Product"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "POST /api/admin/products working correctly, successfully creates new products"

  - task: "Admin - Update Product"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "PUT /api/admin/products/{id} working correctly, successfully updates product information"

  - task: "Admin - List All Orders"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/admin/orders working correctly, returns all orders for admin view (empty as no successful payments)"

  - task: "Admin - Update Order Status"
    implemented: true
    working: "NA"
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "PUT /api/admin/orders/{id} endpoint implemented but not testable without valid order ID"

  - task: "Admin - List All Users"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "GET /api/admin/users working correctly, returns all users (2 users: admin and test user)"

frontend:
  # Frontend testing not performed as per instructions

metadata:
  created_by: "testing_agent"
  version: "1.0"
  test_sequence: 1
  run_ui: false

test_plan:
  current_focus:
    - "All backend API endpoints tested"
  stuck_tasks: []
  test_all: true
  test_priority: "high_first"

agent_communication:
  - agent: "testing"
    message: "Comprehensive backend API testing completed. 25/27 tests passed (92.6% success rate). Only 2 tests marked as NA due to dependency on successful payment verification with real Razorpay credentials. All core functionality working correctly including authentication, products, cart, payments, orders, user profiles, and admin operations. Database seeding working properly with 6 sample products and admin user creation. Payment flow implemented correctly but requires real Razorpay credentials for full end-to-end testing."
